revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-6-030

One of a set of conductors that is connected to an electric source at a point at which there is the greatest voltage.


Note: The set of conductors may commonly be in the form of a cable.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Line conductor}}
